summary: Iteration 4 — full validation of the new interactive Dashboard (Weekly Planner + interactive stat/hero/quick-action/match cards), Settings page CRUD (PATCH/DELETE team), liquid-glass redesign, half-court Lineup, and Estadísticas (renamed Analítica) with reception quick-input buttons (rece#/rece+/rece!). 26/26 pytest backend tests PASSED (8 new + 18 regression). All targeted frontend testids verified end-to-end via Playwright. No regressions found.

issues: Weekly Planner / stat cards / hero buttons appear ~2-3s after login while activeTeam is being loaded. First Playwright sweep with no wait found them missing. Not a bug, but consider showing a skeleton/spinner so early E2E and slow networks don't see an empty page momentarily.

action_items: (Optional, carryover) CORS still uses allow_origins=['*'] alongside allow_credentials=True — use explicit origin list for production hardening.
(Optional UX) Show a loading skeleton on Dashboard while activeTeam is being resolved instead of returning the 'Crear equipo' empty state; otherwise newly-logged-in users briefly see the wrong UI.
critical_code_review_comments: PATCH /api/teams/{team_id}: payload uses TeamIn (all fields with defaults) so a missing body still passes validation — correct. update dict drops None values via comprehension, preserving partial-update semantics (color default '#EA580C' will however always be set if the client doesn't send color; consider Optional[str]=None on TeamIn for true PATCH semantics).

DELETE /api/teams/{team_id}: cascade is correctly ordered (read match_ids/training_ids first, then delete dependents). Verified all collections wiped + team_ids pulled from users via integration test.
Dashboard.jsx WeeklyPlanner: dialog form uses required HTML5 fields and posts /api/trainings — works. Persisted training visible immediately after submit.

Settings.jsx: settings-save-btn is correctly disabled for non-owners (owner check via team.owner_id===me.user_id). settings-delete-confirm uses AlertDialog and navigates to /dashboard after delete. Verified.
Lineup.jsx now uses .vp-half-court with 6 court-slot-P{1..6} testids — all present.

Analytics.jsx: stats-rec_excellent / stats-rec_perfect / stats-rec_ok present, posts /api/stats with action='reception' and quality kill/perfect/medium. Backend stats summary keeps 'kills' bucket ONLY for action='attack'+quality='kill', so reception+kill correctly does NOT inflate kills (verified).
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_team_crud.py (new — 8 tests for PATCH/DELETE team and reception stats regression)

success_rate.frontend: 100% on all targeted flows (weekly planner, stat cards nav, hero, quick actions, settings PATCH+DELETE confirm, lineup half-court, estadísticas reception buttons, recent match nav)

test_credentials: admin@zentia.com / ZentiaAdmin2026! (works). Each test run also creates ad-hoc users via /api/auth/register with random emails like other_<hex>@zentia.com / Pass1234!.
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_-prefixed teams, players, matches, stats, lineups, trainings, attendance, announcements, messages, gallery; each test deletes its own team at the end (cascade removes all). Some leftover TEST_ data from manual UI run (TEST_UI_Renamed team).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 4 fully green. New regression suite at /app/backend/tests/test_team_crud.py covers PATCH/DELETE team owner authorization + cascade. UI testids confirmed: weekly-planner, planner-day-0..6, planner-prev/today/next, planner-add-training, planner-training-title/time/submit, planner-event-{id}, dash-stat-players/scheduled/played/won, hero-start-datavolley/design-lineup/roster/stats, quick-lineup/stats/comms/attendance, dash-match-{id}, settings-btn, settings-team-name, settings-save-btn, settings-delete-btn, settings-delete-confirm, volleyball-court (vp-half-court), court-slot-P1..P6, stats-rec_excellent/perfect/ok, stats-player-{id}, nav-analytics. Important: wait ~2-3s after login for activeTeam to load before querying dashboard testids.
rca of the issue: No bugs found. Initial Playwright sweep saw missing dashboard testids only because activeTeam state hadn't yet resolved — a 3.5s wait after redirect to /dashboard fixed all assertions.
